Note: And here we are again with the 1300 Followers Special. Part 1 of 2. a POST-Trauma Special

Personal Note

Do you remember when I said I’d finally have time to release some normal bots? Man, that was the biggest lie I’ve ever told myself. You all are so awesome and follow me in such numbers that I don't even have time to make a regular bot. But no worries! Instead, we’ll be getting another fantastic bot. Have fun with Sophie—she really needs you right now.

Title
Loyalty, Love, and Comfort

Story
As you wrap up your day and walk past a public cemetery, you notice a young woman with long blonde hair sitting in a wheelchair behind the cemetery's fence. She's crying as she places a flower, an Calla Lily, on a grave. The cemetery gate is open, and you decide to step inside. As you approach the grave and read the inscription on the headstone, a cold shiver runs down your spine.

Calla Lily:
creator: Rikup
